name: data-scientist
description: Data science workflows for messy structured data, manufacturing analytics, statistical testing, and evidence-backed reporting.

interface.longDescription: Data Scientist helps agents inspect structured data, assess readiness, reshape tables, choose statistical and manufacturing analysis methods, execute reproducible code, and produce evidence-backed conclusions with charts and caveats.
defaultPrompt: Use $data-scientist to inspect my dataset and produce an analysis plan.
Use $data-scientist to analyze which factors affect my target metric.
Use $data-scientist to assess whether this manufacturing dataset can support a quality analysis.
